description_long: This house features a prominent red gable roof with a large central dormer window on the front facade, framed by blue glass and wooden trim. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored horizontal wooden siding, giving it a warm, rustic appearance. The front side includes multiple large barn-style doors with black metal hinges, suggesting a possible garage or storage function. The side elevations display a series of rectangular windows set into the roof and walls, providing ample natural light to the upper floor. The house sits on a stone or concrete foundation, with a paved area extending along one side. The overall design blends traditional barn-like elements with modern residential features.
description: A two-story house with a red gable roof, large front dormer window, light wood siding, and barn-style doors, set on a stone foundation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large central dormer window, multiple barn-style doors, and the main facade's wooden siding.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped red roof with skylights, a single window, and the paved area adjacent to the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying three roof windows, a single ground-level door, and the stone foundation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with roof skylights, a single window, and the continuation of the paved area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large central dormer and roof skylights
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features large barn-style doors with black metal hinges, no visible porch or steps, and a simple, functional design.
